decisions.reasoning: Since we are in a speed tie and Hurricane is a 2HKO, attacking is the optimal play to secure momentum or potentially win the speed tie to gain a significant advantage.

Iron Hands threatens an OHKO with Wild Charge, and Tornadus-Therian cannot secure a KO. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to Iron Hands' primary Fighting-type STAB and forces the opponent to respect the threat of a special attacker.
Flutter Mane is already fainted (0% HP), so I must bring in a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is the safest pivot to handle Iron Hands' potential coverage while maintaining momentum.

Tornadus-Therian is threatened with an OHKO by Iron Hands' Wild Charge and cannot secure a KO in return. Switching to Calyrex-Ice provides a safe pivot that resists Ice Punch and threatens Iron Hands with STAB Psychic-type damage.
Calyrex-Ice is in a 2HKO range against Iron Hands and can secure the KO in two turns. Since Iron Hands' Drain Punch is a 3HKO, I win the exchange by staying in and attacking.
Calyrex-Ice is at 10% HP and will be KO'd by any of Tornadus-Therian's moves. Since Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO, I must use it now to secure the trade before Calyrex-Ice faints.

Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Incineroar provides Intimidate support to mitigate physical pressure from Tornadus-Therian and can pivot out with U-turn to maintain momentum.
Since we are in a speed tie, Hurricane is the optimal play to secure a 2HKO and win the mirror match if we win the tie or survive the incoming hit.
Since we are in a speed tie and Hurricane is a guaranteed 2HKO, attacking is the optimal play to secure the KO before the opponent can retaliate.

The opponent's Tornadus-Therian is at 42% HP, putting it well within range of a Hurricane KO (50-59%). Since we are in a speed tie, attacking is the optimal play to remove their Tornadus before they can potentially pivot or heal.
The opponent's Tornadus-Therian is at 15% HP, meaning Hurricane is a guaranteed KO. Since I win the speed tie or lose it, attacking is the only way to secure the win this turn.
Since both Tornadus-Therian are at low HP and Hurricane is a guaranteed 2HKO, attacking is the priority to secure the KO before the opponent can act, especially given the speed tie.
